meta.problemStatement: Our customer support team spends 70% of their time answering repetitive questions. We need a solution to reduce manual responses.

versions.title: AI Self-Service Support Portal
versions.description: Build a customer-facing self-service portal that answers repetitive questions with approved knowledge base content and escalates low-confidence or sensitive issues to agents. This directly targets the 70% repetitive-answer workload while extending the existing AI-Assisted Support Ticketing project instead of duplicating it.
versions.summary: A customer portal for instant approved FAQ answers, confidence routing, and human escalation.

versions.title: Agent Assist Response Copilot
versions.description: Deploy an internal agent copilot that drafts replies, suggests approved macros, and flags exceptions for human review. This reduces manual typing without taking full customer-facing automation risk on billing, privacy, and compliance-sensitive cases.
versions.summary: An internal support cockpit for AI-drafted responses, policy guardrails, and faster agent handling.

versions.title: Knowledge Automation Studio
versions.description: Create a governed workflow that clusters repetitive tickets, drafts knowledge articles from best agent answers, and publishes approved content to customer self-service and agent macros. This is the lowest-risk path because it improves the knowledge supply chain before broad automation.
versions.summary: A workflow studio that turns repeated support answers into approved help content and reusable macros.
